notes: process_violation: no_clarifying_question — the model produced a large multi-section structured output (Key Strengths, Critical Discovery Questions, Recommended Pre-MRM Actions, Timeline Confidence, Next Steps) framed as a discovery advisory before asking any clarifying question, and the output lacks a proper problem statement, named personas, MVP scope, out-of-scope items, regulatory constraint framing (FMA, CCCFA, MRM 2023 policy), or genuine uncertainty-based assumptions — it is a solution-oriented pre-MRM checklist rather than a discovery artefact.
